goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should 'arrive by 13:45'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'peterborough'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'departure time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'avalon'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel' and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on tuesday and should arrive by 13:45
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to peterborough
Make sure you get travel time and departure time
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called avalon
Make sure you get star of the hotel and phone number
